Tests the immutability of `Number.MAX_VALUE` by attempting to delete it.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that tests the immutability of the `Number.MAX_VALUE` property in JavaScript. It uses the `delete` operator to attempt to remove `Number.MAX_VALUE` and then asserts that the operation returns `false`. This confirms that `Number.MAX_VALUE` is a non-configurable property, which means it cannot be deleted or altered. The script serves as a validation check to ensure that the JavaScript environment adheres to the ECMAScript specification regarding the `Number.MAX_VALUE` property.
